item.title: Target set to open its 2,000th store, plans to open hundreds more in next decade
item.description: Target reaches a major milestone with its 2,000th store opening in North Carolina this month, one of 30 locations set to open this year across the cou...

item.title: Americans tap retirement funds at record rates as mounting financial stress takes toll
item.description: Record 6% of Americans tapped 401k savings for hardship withdrawals in 2025, up from 4.8% in 2024, as financial stress forces workers to raid nest egg...

item.title: US layoff announcements ease in February after elevated cuts in prior month
item.description: U.S. layoffs dropped 55% in February to 48,307 job cuts after elevated January numbers, offering relief amid ongoing economic uncertainty and rising c...

item.title: Mortgage rates tick higher to 6%
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage rose this week to 6%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is up from last we...

item.title: USDA credits Trump trade deals as agricultural deficit shrinks, farm sector gains ground
item.description: The USDA reports a drop in the agricultural trade deficit from $43.7 billion to $29 billion in 2026. Officials credit President Donald Trump's trade d...
